The following is a METAR: EGLL 080120Z 21010KT 9999 SCT030 07/04 Q1023 NOSIG=

The wind is reported as...

options.a: wind direction 210 degrees true and speed of 10 knots.
options.b: wind direction 210 degrees magnetic and speed of 10 knots.
options.c: wind direction 210 degrees true and speed of 10 statute miles per hour.
options.d: wind direction 210 degrees magnetic and speed of 10 statute miles per hour.
